race.comment: WINTER GRACE (8) struggled to find last start at Sandown Lakeside in a much tougher race when getting back on a day that was tough to make ground. Finds a nice race and can turn things around having won nicely here prior. JUST DANCE (7) was a determined maiden winner last time out, scoring by one length over 2025m at Cranbourne. Can go on with it now from an inside gate. CHATEAU VEGA (12) is struggling to break through but hasn't been far away, the latest finishing a 4.5 lengths fourth at Sale. Should be poised just off the lead and prove hard to hold out. AVONVIEW (9) is a consistent sort who has placed in two runs since a rare win at Kilmore, expect he pushes forward and runs well again.
